source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/2. DMR/06. MCU Firmware/CYAN FW 업로드 가이드(TI MCU)_20260303.pptx

document.title: CYAN F/W 펌웨어 설치 가이드 (TI MCU)

sourceSummary.oneLine: CYAN TI MCU firmware upload guide dated 2026.03.03 from the DR 개발팀.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides step-by-step work instructions for connecting the upload jig and Micro 5-pin cable, using CCStudio UniFlash to load distributed firmware, verifying the image, and confirming power operation.
keyPoints: Required configuration includes TI MCU FW upload jig and Micro 5-pin cable.
Firmware upload uses CCStudio UniFlash, Browse under Flash Image(s), Run Actions option, and Load Image.
Completion is indicated by 'Program Load completed successfully' and verification by Verify Image with SUCCESS message.
Final check confirms power turns on when operating the switch after mounting to the voltage measurement jig.

concepts.name: Firmware upload jig
concepts.evidence: TI MCU FW 업로드용 지그 Micro 5-pin cable

concepts.name: CCStudio UniFlash firmware loading
concepts.evidence: Program 에서 Flash Image(s) 란에 Browse 를 클릭하여 배포된 FW 를 올린다 .

concepts.pageTarget: Run Target After Program Load Flash Operation
concepts.evidence: Run Actions 옵션의 체크박스를 활성화 한다 . (Run Target After Program Load/Flash Operation)

concepts.name: Firmware image verification
concepts.evidence: 업로드 확인을 위한 Verify Image 를 실행한다 .

evidence.claim: The document is titled CYAN F/W firmware installation guide for TI MCU.
evidence.evidenceText: CYAN F/W 펌웨어 설치 가이드 (TI MCU)

evidence.claim: The writing department is DR 개발팀 and the author is 서동철.
The upload configuration includes a TI MCU FW upload jig and Micro 5-pin cable.
evidence.evidenceText: TI MCU FW 업로드 1/8 - 구성 TI MCU FW 업로드용 지그 Micro 5-pin cable

evidence.claim: The Micro 5-pin cable is connected to the PC for upload.
evidence.evidenceText: 업로드를 위한 Micro 5-pin cable 을 PC 와 연결한다 .

evidence.claim: The Micro 5-pin cable from the jig is mounted to the MAIN BOARD.
evidence.evidenceText: 지그에서 나오는 Micro 5-pin cable 을 MAIN BOARD 에 장착한다 .

evidence.claim: CCStudio UniFlash is installed and executed for TI MCU firmware upload.
evidence.evidenceText: CCStudio UniFlash 프로그램을 설치 후 실행한다 .

evidence.claim: The distributed firmware is selected in Flash Image(s), with extension .OUT, then loaded using Load Image.
evidence.evidenceText: Flash Image(s) 란에 Browse 를 클릭하여 배포된 FW 를 올린다 . ( 확장자 : . OUT) ... Load Image 를 클릭하여 FW 를 업로드한다 .

evidence.claim: Upload completion is indicated by the Program Load completed successfully message.
evidence.evidenceText: 완료 후 아래 Program Load completed successfully 메시지가 나오면 업로드 완료 .

evidence.claim: Upload verification is performed by running Verify Image and checking the SUCCESS message.
evidence.evidenceText: 업로드 확인을 위한 Verify Image 를 실행한다 . ... 완료시 표출되는 SUCCESS 메시지를 확인한다 .

evidence.claim: The final check verifies that power turns on when operating the switch after mounting to the voltage measurement jig.
evidence.evidenceText: 전압측정 지그에 장착 후 스위치 동작 시 전원이 켜지는지 확인한다 .
